textByHash.73b31d78012aa874b24519b59786d8533218691f: The finest smiths from all over Gielinor come here to work, and I buy the fruit of their craft. Armour made from the higher metals!
textByHash.7d88b54d541e5be7932dadb10b36c2c9e7bc147c: You just don't appreciate the beauty of fine metalwork.
textByHash.94bbe3ac35221a0861452f45125914d93e319c3f: Only the top smiths are allowed in there!
